name: Grilled Polynesian Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine soy sauce, brown sugar, ginger, and garlic powder. Mix well.
2. Place chicken on a plate. Brush both sides of each breast half with the soy sauce mixture. Cover; let stand for 15 minutes at room temperature to marinate.
3. Heat the grill. When ready to barbecue, oil the grill rack.
4. Place chicken on the gas grill over medium-high heat or on charcoal grill, 4-6 inches from medium-high coals.
5. Cook for 8-10 minutes, turning once, until chicken is tender and juices run clear.
6. Top each with pineapple slice during the last few minutes of cooking time.
7. Serve sprinkled with coconut.
